scripts.setup: bun install && ([ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env" ] && [ ! -f ".env" ] && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env" .env || true) && for pkg in "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH"/packages/*/; do pkg_name=$(basename "$pkg"); [ -f "$pkg/.env" ] && [ ! -f "packages/$pkg_name/.env" ] && cp "$pkg/.env" "packages/$pkg_name/.env" || true; [ -f "$pkg/.env.example" ] && [ ! -f "packages/$pkg_name/.env" ] && cp "$pkg/.env.example" "packages/$pkg_name/.env" || true; done && ([ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ] && cd packages/server && bun run db:migrate || true)
